conversations.content: Write the following message to the channel starting with External: Hi, i am a bot

<function_thought>
I need to first retrieve the list of channels in order to find a channel that starts with "External". Once I have the list, I can check for the appropriate channel and then send the message "Hi, I am a bot" to that channel.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_channels()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
I have retrieved the list of channels: ['general', 'random', 'private', 'External_0']. The channel that starts with "External" is "External_0". Next, I will send the message "Hi, I am a bot" to this channel.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[send_channel_message(channel="External_0", body="Hi, I am a bot")]</function_call>
